text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
280 
WVR_ID 
LABEL: 
Waiver Identification Number 
DESCRIPTION: Field specifying the waiver or demonstration which authorized payment for a claim. 
SHORT NAME: WVR_ID 
LONG NAME: WVR_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
20 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Waiver ID, maximum 20 letters and numbers 
Null/missing = Source value
